# sakura_monitoring_suite_alert_rule (Data Source)

Get information about an existing Monitoring Suite Alert Rule.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "sakura_monitoring_suite_alert_rule" "foobar" {
  name = "foobar"
  # or
  # id = "alert-rule-uuid-id"
  alert_project_id = "alert-project-resource-id" # e.g. sakura_monitoring_suite_alert_project.foobar.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `alert_project_id` (String) The resource ID of the Alert Project.

### Optional

- `id` (String) The ID of the Monitoring Suite Alert Rule.
- `name` (String) The name of the Monitoring Suite Alert Rule.

### Read-Only

- `enabled_critical` (Boolean) Whether to enable critical level of the Alert Rule.
- `enabled_warning` (Boolean) Whether to enable warning level of the Alert Rule.
- `format` (String) The format of the Alert Rule.
- `metric_storage_id` (String) The metric storage ID of the Alert Rule.
- `open` (Boolean) Whether the Alert Rule is open.
- `query` (String) The query of the Alert Rule.
- `template` (String) The template of the Alert Rule.
- `threshold_critical` (String) The threshold of critical level of the Alert Rule.
- `threshold_duration_critical` (Number) The threshold duration (in seconds) of critical level of the Alert Rule.
- `threshold_duration_warning` (Number) The threshold duration (in seconds) of warning level of the Alert Rule.
- `threshold_warning` (String) The threshold of warning level of the Alert Rule.
